title: Major problem - missing data from Monday - the system deletes information from certain column without any log or other information
excerpt: Hi, I have had a really bad case with Monday. We have created quite large board with a date dependency column. And all data from this column has dissapeared in one minute. The system deleted them  - not us. No any log in…

posts.author: pegam (Przemek Gamdzyk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I have had a really bad case with Monday. We have created quite large board with a date dependency column. And all data from this column has dissapeared in one minute. The system deleted them - not us. No any log information in Pulses about any data deletion/change, so no way to go back to what was before. We of course contacted Monday helpdesk, got the information that the problem has been sent to Monday developers team … and more that 3 weeks passed by and … nothing. What is not really a business speed and we can’t wait that long obvioulsy having processes running. That doubts Monday as reliable business platform and really suprises us. Does anyone of you have ever expierenced such behaviour - unexpected deletion of data from boards?
